---
title: "Flatland"
author: Edwin Abott
date: 2025-10-2
Rating: 8 / 10
---

### Highlights
> The lower-middle classes were equally invested in emphasizing their superiority to what they considered to be the less respectable classes below them.
> 
> **Introduction** (Location 143)

---

> and I am mocked at— I, the sole possessor of the truths of Space and of the theory of the introduction of Light from the world of Three Dimensions— as if I were the maddest of the mad!
> 
> **FLATLAND** (Location 755)
